productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Boy Striped Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue and white striped shirt, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, tipped collar, buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest, appliqué on the right chest, yoke on the shoulders and at the back, stitch detailing, a red vertical panel in the middle at the back with stitch detailing and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Let your little boy learn to play Basketball in style with this striped shirt from doodle. Teach him the game and sporting spirit, while the cotton fabric keeps him fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and sports shoes for an even more sporty look.
